x-ui.effect: Search the knowledge-base DOCUMENTS (RAG). Turn off for a Q&A-only node that pulls only curated FAQ pairs.

top_k.description: How many knowledge-base document chunks to retrieve (only when include_docs is true).

x-ui.effect: Hybrid search: blend lexical BM25 keyword matching with semantic vectors (RRF). Catches exact terms - codes, names, SKUs - that pure vector search can miss.

Two-stage retrieval: after the initial search, a local cross-encoder re-scores the shortlist and keeps only the best matches. Big accuracy boost; adds some latency. Runs offline on CPU (no extra cost).

rerank_top_n.description: How many chunks to pull into the rerank shortlist before the cross-encoder trims them to top_k (only when rerank is true). Leave unset to auto-size the shortlist (roughly 6× top_k, minimum 25).

x-ui.effect: Also pull matching Q&A pairs into context - retrieval then grounds the agent on BOTH KB docs and Q&A.

qa_threshold.description: Minimum similarity for a Q&A pair to be included (only when include_qa is true).

qa_top_k.description: How many Q&A pairs to retrieve (only when include_qa is true).

qa_kinds.description: Only include Q&A pairs of these kinds/categories (empty = all; only when include_qa is true).

min_score.description: Drop document chunks below this cosine similarity so off-topic queries surface nothing. Not applied when rerank is on (the cross-encoder score is on a different scale and already keeps only the best matches).

x-ui.effect: When nothing relevant is found, inject a note so a grounded agent says it doesn't know instead of guessing.

source_filter.description: Restrict retrieval to specific knowledge sources.

folders.description: Restrict retrieval to sources in these knowledge folders (empty = all).

route_key.description: Optional state key set to 'yes'/'no' (anything found?) so a Router can branch found → agent / not-found → escalation.

$comment: ports: in:text, out:json. Fields mirror forge/nodes/rag.py retrieval_factory.
